leadText: Mesagoza (Japanese: テーブルシティ Table City) is the largest city in the Paldea region, located in its geographical center. It is part of the South Province. It is the most populous city in the Pokémon world as so far revealed.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Naranja Academy 1.2 Uva Academy 1.3 Chains 1.3.1 Artisan Bakery 1.3.2 Bagin's 1.3.3 Barato's 1.3.4 Capbourg 1.3.5 Chansey Supply 1.3.6 Chic Kebab 1.3.7 Deli Cioso 1.3.8 Delibird Presents 1.3.9 Every Wich Way 1.3.10 Go-For-Broke Grill 1.3.11 Kanto Crepes 1.3.12 Picnic-Knacks 1.3.13 Rough & Tough 1.3.14 Salon Renacer 1.3.15 Seabreeze Café 1.3.16 Seafood Fresco 1.3.17 Smoochurro 1.3.18 Sock Quarter 1.3.19 Spec Shack 1.3.20 Sugar-N-Ice 1.3.21 Sure Cans 1.3.22 Zapaldea Footwear 1.4 Vending machines Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Naranja Academy [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Naranja Academy Naranja Academy is a school exclusive to Pokémon Scarlet . Uva Academy [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Uva Academy Uve Academy is a school exclusive to Pokémon Violet . Chains [ edit | edit source ] Artisan Bakery [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Artisan Bakery Artisan Bakery is a chain store that sells various sandwich ingredients and picks. It has three locations in Mesagoza: one is a across from the Mesagoza West Gate, one is southwest of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center , and one is north of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center slightly across the flight of stairs. Bagin's [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Bagin's Bagin's is a clothing retailer that specializes in selling backpacks . It has one location in Mesagoza, at the northwest corner of the central plaza battle court. Type Item Brand Patterns Price Bags Canvas Backpack White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Olive, Brown $ 3,000 After obtaining the Teal Style Card ( TM ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Bags Two-Way Nylon Backpack White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange $ 2,500 Barato's [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Barato's Barato's is a restaurant chain that sells sweet and savory foods which provide Meal Powers . It has three locations in Mesagoza: one southwest of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center , one north of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center up the flight of stairs, and one northwest of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center at the base of a hill. Capbourg [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Capbourg Capbourg is a clothing retailer that sells various types of headwear . It has one location in Mesagoza, at the northeast corner of the central plaza battle court. Type Item Brand Patterns Price Headwear Sporty Cap Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown, Grass, Water, Fire, Electric, Normal, Flying, Bug, Fighting, Psychic, Ghost, Ground, Rock, Ice, Dark, Fairy, Poison, Steel, Dragon $ 1,000 Headwear Gatsby Cap White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown, Wabash Stripes, Black Leather, Checkered Gray $ 1,500 Headwear Beanie White $ 1,500 After obtaining the Teal Style Card ( TM ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Headwear Earflap Cap White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 1,800 After obtaining the Indigo Style Card ( ID ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Headwear Stampede Hat White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown, A, B, C $ 2,000 Chansey Supply [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Chansey Supply Chansey Supply is a chain store that sells medicines , battle items , and mints . It has two locations in Mesagoza: one at the southeast corner of the central plaza battle court, and one west of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center . Chic Kebab [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Chic Kebab Chic Kebab is a vending cart chain that sells grilled foods which provide Meal Powers . It has two locations in Mesagoza, one on either side of southern entrance to the central plaza battle court. Deli Cioso [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Deli Cioso Deli Cioso is a chain store that sells various sandwich ingredients . It has three locations in Mesagoza: one southeast of the Mesagoza West Gate, one southwest of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center , and one slightly northeast of the Mesagoza main entrance at the mouth of a street. Delibird Presents [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Delibird Presents Delibird Presents is a chain store that sells battle items , Poké Balls , and certain Evolution items . It has three locations in Mesagoza: one northeast of the Mesagoza West Gate, one southeast of the Mesagoza West Gate, and one slightly northeast of the Mesagoza main entrance. The General goods and Poké Balls are the same as every other store, but for Mesagoza this is the stock of Battle items and Rotom Phone cases. Battle Items Magnet $ 3,000 Hard Stone $ 3,000 Poison Barb $ 3,000 Spell Tag $ 3,000 Dragon Fang $ 3,000 Normal Gem $ 15,000 Leftovers 4 Badges $ 20,000 Big Root $ 10,000 Bright Powder Postgame $ 30,000 Light Clay $ 20,000 Utility Umbrella 4 Badges $ 15,000 Terrain Extender Postgame $ 15,000 Air Balloon 4 Badges $ 15,000 Shed Shell $ 20,000 White Herb 4 Badges $ 20,000 Mental Herb $ 10,000 Power Herb Postgame $ 30,000 Mirror Herb $ 30,000 Absorb Bulb 4 Badges $ 5,000 Cell Battery 4 Badges $ 5,000 Luminous Moss 4 Badges $ 5,000 Snowball 4 Badges $ 5,000 Heat Rock 4 Badges $ 8,000 Damp Rock 4 Badges $ 8,000 Smooth Rock 4 Badges $ 8,000 Icy Rock 4 Badges $ 8,000 Electric Seed Postgame $ 30,000 Psychic Seed Postgame $ 30,000 Misty Seed Postgame $ 20,000 Grassy Seed Postgame $ 20,000 Rotom Phone Cases Grass Case $ 2,500 Water Case $ 2,500 Fire Case $ 2,500 Electric Case $ 2,500 Normal Case $ 2,500 Flying Case $ 2,500 Bug Case $ 2,500 Fighting Case $ 2,500 Psychic Case $ 2,500 Ghost Case $ 2,500 Ground Case $ 2,500 Rock Case $ 2,500 Ice Case $ 2,500 Dark Case $ 2,500 Fairy Case $ 2,500 Poison Case $ 2,500 Steel Case $ 2,500 Dragon Case $ 2,500 Komala Log Case $ 5,000 Flabébé Flower Case $ 5,000 Magnemite Magnet Case $ 5,000 Gothita Ribbon Case $ 5,000 Every Wich Way [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Every Wich Way Every Wich Way is a restaurant chain that sells sandwiches which provide Meal Powers . It has five locations in Mesagoza: One northwest of the Mesagoza main entrance One next to the entrance to the Pokémon League One northwest of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center , at the top of a hill Two northeast of the Mesagoza main entrance, one hidden in a plaza and one outside the same plaza Go-For-Broke Grill [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Go-For-Broke Grill Go-For-Broke Grill is a restaurant chain that sells various savory dishes which provide Meal Powers . It has seven locations in Mesagoza: Three southwest of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center , one hidden in an alley, one overlooking the western battle court, and one in front of the southwestern park Two side-by-side along the eastern row of buildings before the southern entrance of the central plaza battle court One outside the eastern entrance to the central plaza battle court One northwest of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center, at the base of a hill Kanto Crepes [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Kanto Crepes Kanto Crepes is a vending cart chain that sells sweet crepes which provide Meal Powers . It has five locations in Mesagoza: Two at the southern entrance of the central plaza battle court, one on either side One behind the staircase to Naranja S /Uva V Academy One northwest of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center , at the top of a hill One west of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center, in a park Picnic-Knacks [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Picnic-Knacks Picnic-Knacks is a chain store that sells various picnic items and accessories. It has one location in Mesagoza, at the northwest corner of the central plaza battle court. Shop Inventory Lilac Tablecloth $ 1,000 Mint Tablecloth $ 1,000 Peach Tablecloth $ 1,000 Striped Tablecloth $ 1,500 Whimsical Tablecloth $ 2,000 Leafy Tablecloth $ 2,000 Monstrous Tablecloth $ 2,000 Striped Bottle $ 1,000 Barred Cup $ 800 Striped Cup $ 800 Steel Bottle (R) $ 1,500 Steel Bottle (Y) $ 1,500 Steel Bottle (B) $ 1,500 Flower Pattern Cup $ 800 Fire Pattern Cup $ 800 Yarn Ball $ 1,000 Rough & Tough [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Rough & Tough Rough & Tough is a clothing retailer that sells a wide variety of clothing items . It has one location in Mesagoza, at the southeast corner of the central plaza battle court. Type Item Brand Patterns Price Gloves Plain Gloves White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 800 Gloves Fingerless Mittens Mosaic I, Mosaic II, Mosaic III $ 1,000 Headwear Pom-Pom Hat White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown, Zigzags, Big Horn, Spicy Pepper $ 2,000 Eyewear Horn-Rimmed Glasses White, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 500 Eyewear Horn-Rimmed Sunglasses All-Black, Black / Yellow, Black / Blue, Black / Red, Mottled $ 500 After obtaining the Teal Style Card ( TM ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Headwear Greavard Beanie White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 3,200 After obtaining the Indigo Style Card ( ID ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Headwear Fur Bucket Hat White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange $ 3,000 {{{6}}} Salon Renacer [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Salon Renacer Salon Renacer is a barbershop franchise that offers hairstyle changes for the player . It has one location in Mesagoza, at the northwest corner of the central plaza battle court. Seabreeze Café [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Seabreeze Café Seabreeze Café is a restaurant chain that sells light fare which provide Meal Powers . It has nine locations in Mesagoza: Three close to the Mesagoza main entrance, two to the northwest and one to the northeast One just south of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center Three in the central plaza battle court, two at the southwest corner and one at the southeast corner Two at the base of the staircase to Naranja S /Uva V Academy, one on either side Seafood Fresco [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Seafood Fresco Seafood Fresco is a restaurant chain that mostly sells various seafood dishes which provide Meal Powers . It has four locations in Mesagoza: one southwest of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center , and three side-by-side along the western row of buildings before the southern entrance of the central plaza battle court. Smoochurro [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Smoochurro Smoochurro is a vending cart chain that sells different types of churros which provide Meal Powers . It has one location in Mesagoza, south of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center . Sock Quarter [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Sock Quarter Sock Quarter is a clothing retailer that sells different types of socks and legwear . It has one location in Mesagoza, at the northeast corner of the central plaza battle court. Type Item Brand Patterns Price Legwear High Socks White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 500 Legwear Sporty High Socks Neon Green, Neon Orange, Neon Yellow, Neon Pink, Neon Blue $ 500 Legwear Plaid High Socks Red, White, Purple, Black, Blue $ 500 Legwear Floral High Socks Green, Red, Yellow, Blue, Pink $ 500 Legwear Sporty High Socks Orange, Purple, Green, Red, Navy $ 500 After obtaining the Teal Style Card ( TM ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Legwear Striped High Socks White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 1,000 After obtaining the Indigo Style Card ( ID ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Legwear Bicolor Tights I, II, III $ 2,200 Spec Shack [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Spec Shack Spec Shack is a clothing retailer that specializes in selling eyeglasses . It has one location in Mesagoza, at the northeast corner of the central plaza battle court. Type Item Brand Patterns Price Eyewear Half-Rim Glasses White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 500 Eyewear Half-Rim Sunglasses Black, Yellow, Blue, Red, Mottled $ 1,000 After obtaining the Teal Style Card ( TM ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Eyewear Hexagonal Glasses White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Turquoise, Beige, Olive, Brown, Black / Orange, Black / Purple, All-Gold, All-Silver $ 2,000 Eyewear Hexagonal Sunglasses Black / Orange, Black / Purple, All-Gold, All-Silver $ 2,000 After obtaining the Indigo Style Card ( ID ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Eyewear Polarized Sports Sunglasses Blue, Yellow, Sky Blue, Black, White $ 2,500 Sugar-N-Ice [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Sugar-N-Ice Sugar-N-Ice is a vending cart chain that sells ice cream cones of various flavors which provide Meal Powers . It has seven locations in Mesagoza: One northwest of the Mesagoza main entrance One northwest of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center , next to the top of the stairs Two side-by-side before the southern entrance of the central plaza battle court Two northwest of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center, at the top of a hill One southwest of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center, in a park Sure Cans [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Sure Cans Sure Cans is a chain store that sells sandwich ingredients , mostly fruits and vegetables. It has two locations in Mesagoza: one west of the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center , and one west of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center. Zapaldea Footwear [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Zapaldea Footwear Zapaldea Footwear is a clothing retailer that sells different types of shoes . It has one location in Mesagoza, at the northeast corner of the central plaza battle court. Type Item Brand Patterns Price Footwear Performance Sneakers Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Turquoise, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 4,000 Footwear Performance Sneakers Earthworm, Couple, Drowsing $ 4,000 Footwear Performance Sneakers A, B, C $ 6,000 Footwear Low-Top Sneakers White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 4,000 Footwear Low-Top Sneakers Pastel Pink, Pastel Green, Pastel Purple $ 6,000 After obtaining the Teal Style Card ( TM ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Footwear Slip-Ons White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange, Navy, Purple, Pink, Gray, Beige, Olive, Brown $ 1,200 Footwear Slip-Ons I, II, III $ 1,500 Footwear Slip-Ons Red / White, Black / White, Green / White $ 1,500 Footwear Slip-Ons A, B, C $ 1,500 Footwear Slip-Ons I, II, III $ 1,500 After obtaining the Indigo Style Card ( ID ) Type Item Brand Patterns Price Footwear Running Shoes White, Black, Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Orange $ 3,000 Vending machines [ edit | edit source ] There are several vending machines located across the city: Slightly southwest of the western battle court At the base of another staircase east of the staircase to Naranja S /Uva V Academy Northwest of the Mesagoza (East) Pokémon Center , at the top of a hill Vending machines Fresh Water $ 200 Soda Pop $ 300 Lemonade $ 350

sections.title: Naranja Academy
sections.text: Naranja Academy [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Naranja Academy Naranja Academy is a school exclusive to Pokémon Scarlet .
